title: Basil Pesto & Cheese Christmas Tree Pastries
ingredients_html:
• 2 puff pastries
  • basil pesto
  • sliced cheese of choice
  • butter, melted
  • garlic cloves, minced
steps_html:
1. Preheat oven to 350 deg F.
  2. Layout sheet of puff pastry. Spread basil pesto across entire puff pastry, then lay out the cheese. Place remaining sheet of puff pastry on top.
  3. Slice the stack into 1 inch wide strips. Fold each strip back and forth, creating a christmas tree shape, and place a toothpick through the center.
  4. Lay down the christmas trees on a parchment paper lined baking sheet.
  5. In a bowl, mix melted butter and minced garlic. Brush garlic buttter over the pastries.
  6. Bake for x minutes, or until cheeses start to brown.
